summary: Testing iteration 32 features: Edit product page image upload, Quick Excel button, Monthly profit section, Normal number format, Unified sidebar. All features verified working correctly.

passed_tests.feature: Edit Product Page - Image upload button (Camera icon) present
Edit Product Page - Family select dropdown present
Edit Product Page - OCR extract from image button present
Edit Product Page - Same fields as Add Product page
Products Page - Quick Excel export button (data-testid='quick-export-excel-btn')
Dashboard - Monthly profit section visible (الفوائد الشهرية)
Dashboard - Profit formula displayed (المبيعات - تكلفة الشراء - التكاليف)
Numbers displayed in normal format (0.00) not Arabic (٠.٠٠)
Sidebar unified - Core sections visible to all users

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ EditProductPage.js has image upload with Camera button and hidden file input (id='product-image-upload')
✓ ProductsPage.js has Quick Excel export button (data-testid='quick-export-excel-btn') with FileSpreadsheet icon
✓ DashboardPage.js includes monthly profit section with 4 cards: Revenue, Purchase Cost, Expenses, Net Profit
✓ Profit formula: monthly_profit = monthly_revenue - monthly_purchase_cost - monthly_expenses
✓ Layout.js sidebar: Core sections (Products, Purchases, Customers, Sales, Reports, etc.) visible to ALL users
✓ Layout.js sidebar: Only WooCommerce, Shipping, Settings, Admin sections are admin-only (appropriate)
✓ Numbers use .toFixed(2) format returning normal digits (0.00), not Arabic numerals
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 32 features verified: 1) Edit Product page now matches Add Product page with image upload button and family select, 2) Quick Excel button added to Products page header, 3) Monthly profit section added to Dashboard showing Revenue - Purchase Cost - Expenses = Net Profit, 4) Numbers display in normal format (0.00) not Arabic, 5) Sidebar unified for all users (core sections visible to all, only admin/system settings remain admin-only).

edit_product_image_upload.details: Camera button with hidden file input for image upload, URL input field, image preview when URL set

edit_product_family_select.details: Family select dropdown with 'بدون عائلة' (No Family) option and quick add family button

quick_excel_export.details: Excel button with FileSpreadsheet icon next to Add Product button, exports products list to .xls file

monthly_profit_section.details: 4-card section showing: المبيعات الشهرية, تكلفة الشراء, التكاليف الشهرية, صافي الربح with formula explanation

normal_numbers_format.details: All numbers display using .toFixed(2) format (e.g., 350.00) not Arabic numerals (٣٥٠.٠٠)

unified_sidebar.details: Core business sections (Products, Purchases, Customers, Sales, Reports, etc.) visible to all users. Only system admin sections remain admin-only.
